items.name: Vero-glass floor unit · With Lights

configure.note: Depth is carcass; full depth = carcass + front + 2 mm (select a programme to see it).

description.title: Vero-glass floor unit
bullets: 1 glass door with anodised aluminium frame and integrated handle
2 vertical, dynamic lights for cupboard sides
Light temperature 2700K or variable of 2700 to 5000K with dimmer possible

engineering.label: Suspended installation approved (ANTOSO, book envelope p.2.03)

planningNotes: Cupboard interior colour = cupboard exterior colour.
Please indicate colour of the frame on the order!
Change of handle or glass not possible.
Possible colours for the interior, see chapter 11.
With carcase depth 56 cm, cable overhang 50 cm.
Cable outlet on both carcase sides at the top.
The light is operated with power supply unit L24 NT...
Either a controller set L24 CF, L24 CB or L24 CSH can be used to control lights, see chapter 91.
Two slots on the power supply unit or controller are required per cupboard!
The protruding Vero-framed door handle requires the door hinge opposite with directly adjacent cupboards with wide angle hinges (or with inner drawers / pullouts).

didYouKnow.text: This cabinet can also be ordered 36 cm deep — same front, deeper carcase.

bullets: If necessary, flush-with-carcase blender behind the front for fully integrated dishwasher, height 82 - 87 cm.

modifications.text: Tip-Softclose touch latch. eOpus: set handle 760

modifications.title: Handle-less electric (761)

planningNotes: Requires ADA dishwasher.
With plinth height 10 cm possible.
Permitted appliances: Miele, Bosch, Siemens, Neff and Gaggenau, if necessary exchange spring set.
Worktop depth min.
63 cm.
Take into consideration extra deep visible sides.
Depending on the dishwasher, the Timelight / Infolight function can slip behind the plinth area with a double-up dishwasher-front.
Can work with Miele, or BSH with 12 cm legs.

tabs.label: Installation

The true width for the installation of boilers and cartridges is 26.7 cm.

Plan optional opening support HFO3.
If a rear panel is required for a sink unit, please always order this unit with the code MP RU.

tabs.label: Overview
notes: Instant Hot Sink Blender — 30 cm door. This sink unit can be set up for standard or deep-sink installation, fitted with a matching visible-side panel, and — for door sinks — modified for extra-deep basins. Use the tabs for the relevant codes.

tabs.label: Installation
notes: Standard carcass depth (56 cm) — no alteration code required.

cards.label: Back Panel with Hose Access Cover

tabs.label: Visible Sides
notes: Matches this unit's carcass depth: 660 mm = 66 cm.
Same deep result from a standard carcass with the deep package. Use both codes together.

tabs.label: Sink Compatibility
notes: No hinge modification — this is a drawer / pullout sink unit. The deep-basin hinge modification (ANSVVO275) applies to door sink units only.

tabs.label: Accessories
notes: Door-mounted accessories (waste bins, cleaning pullouts, towel rails) require a hinged door — they are not compatible with drawer / pullout sink construction.
